name: local-mlx
description: Optional Apple Silicon-native inference via mlx_lm.server. Requires an MLX-format model (safetensors). Primary local path is llama-server (GGUF) — use this only if you've converted or downloaded an MLX build of the Mycroft Qwen fine-tune. Start with: `mlx_lm.server --model <path> --port 8081`.
